_comment: Tier-2 for kratos cosimulation#: catalog had 'ibqn' as a convergence accelerator file/key — real file is block_ibqnls.py (or iqnils.py); 'ibqn' alone is unregistered. Catalog also had 'empire_mapping' as a data_transfer option — 'empire' does NOT appear anywhere in libKratosMappingCore.so. Real mapper type names visible in the binary: nearest_neighbor, nearest_element, barycentric, coupling_geometry, radial_basis_function. The 5 catalog accelerator names (constant_relaxation, aitken, mvqn, ibqn, anderson) reduce to 4 real files (ibqn → block_ibqnls/iqnils). Also: KratosCoSimulationApplication was missing from the .venv until pip installed during this probe. Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
